personal.name: S Prajwall Narayana
personal.title: AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building autonomous app-generation systems and self-healing deployment infrastructure

about.title: Current Work
about.description: AI Engineer at Colligence Research architecting autonomous compilers with Claude Code integration for self-healing deployment pipelines. Building DevOps infrastructure using Docker, Ansible, OpenTofu, and Linode with microfrontend architecture and Citadel auth.

about.title: Research
about.description: 2 IEEE Publications on robotics and ML. Built YOLOv3 rover with 4-DOF robotic arm (published IEEE Xplore Nov 2024) and ResNet50 hyperparameter optimization for plant disease classification.

about.title: Impact
about.description: Platforms serving 1,000+ students (KnotesCentral). 93% accuracy deepfake detection on FaceForensics++ and DFDC benchmarks. 30-language healthcare system (Arogya-Sathi) with symptom checker and X-ray analyzer.

experience.title: AI Engineer & Prompt Engineering Researcher
experience.description: Architecting autonomous compilers with Claude Code integration for self-healing deployment pipelines. Building DevOps infrastructure using Docker, Ansible, OpenTofu, and Linode with microfrontend architecture and Citadel auth.

experience.title: Student Intern - AI Research
experience.description: Developed deepfake detection model using CNN architectures achieving 92.3% accuracy, 90.7% precision, and 91.5% recall on FaceForensics++ and DFDC benchmarks.

experience.title: Associate Consultant Intern
experience.description: Gained expertise in Enterprise Security Architecture and Cybersecurity through work on the IFTAS Cloud project. Applied the SABSA Framework for risk-driven design, cloud security, IAM, and regulatory compliance.

education.title: Bachelor of Engineering - Computer Science
education.description: Computer Science graduate from RVCE. Completed coursework in Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Management, Software Engineering, and Computer Networks.

projects.title: Autonomous App-Generation System
projects.subtitle: Colligence Research - Production
projects.description: Production autonomous compiler generating full-stack applications from structured inputs. Integrated Claude Code as self-healing agent for runtime failure detection and automated recovery. Architected DevOps infrastructure with microfrontend architecture and Citadel auth.
projects.metrics: Self-healing deployment pipeline, predictive error modeling, zero-downtime recovery

projects.title: Arogya-Sathi
projects.subtitle: AI Healthcare Platform
projects.description: Multilingual healthcare platform with symptom checker, X-ray analyzer, report summarizer, and wellness chatbot supporting 30 languages (22 Indian + 8 international). Real-time hospital locator with OpenStreetMap integration.

projects.title: KnotesCentral
projects.subtitle: Academic Resource Platform
projects.description: Centralized platform for academic resources (notes, question papers, lab manuals) serving RVCE student community. Eliminated fragmented resource access across campus.

projects.title: Deepfake Detection Model
projects.subtitle: RVCE Research
projects.description: AI-generated content detection system using CNN architectures trained on industry-standard benchmarks. Research conducted at RVCE Centre of Excellence.

projects.title: Web-Server Controlled Rover
projects.subtitle: IEEE Xplore Publication
projects.description: LAN-controlled modular rover with YOLOv3 object detection, 4-DOF robotic arm, and real-time video streaming. Complete hardware-software integration for autonomous navigation.

projects.title: Plant Disease Classification
projects.subtitle: IEEE Xplore Publication
projects.description: Empirical study standardizing hyperparameter benchmarks for ResNet50 across multiple plant disease datasets. Improved model generalization for real-world agricultural applications.
